description: Watch a Firebase Storage bucket for new files; emit one RunRequest per new object.

outputs.description: Sensor run requests, one per new blob detected.

bucket_name.label: Bucket Name
bucket_name.description: Firebase Storage bucket name (e.g. '<project>.appspot.com'). Empty falls back to the FirebaseResource default.

resource_name.label: Resource Name
resource_name.description: Name of the FirebaseResource this sensor uses.

blob_pattern.label: Blob Pattern
blob_pattern.description: Regex matched against the blob name relative to the prefix.

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Optional name of the job to trigger on detection.

dynamic_partition_name.label: Dynamic Partition Name
dynamic_partition_name.description: If set, register detected blob names as dynamic partitions under this name.

name: Firebase Storage Monitor
